_comment: VA Form 10-0137 — Advance Directive — Error Messages

lastName.pattern: Last name can only include letters, hyphens, apostrophes, and spaces
lastName.maxLength: Last name must be 50 characters or fewer

firstName.pattern: First name can only include letters, hyphens, apostrophes, and spaces
firstName.maxLength: First name must be 50 characters or fewer

middleName.pattern: Middle name can only include letters, hyphens, apostrophes, and spaces
middleName.maxLength: Middle name must be 50 characters or fewer

dateOfBirth.required: Please enter your date of birth
dateOfBirth.invalidDate: Please enter a valid date of birth
dateOfBirth.futureDate: Your date of birth can't be in the future
dateOfBirth.tooRecent: Please enter a valid date of birth

streetAddress.maxLength: Street address must be 100 characters or fewer

city.maxLength: City must be 50 characters or fewer

zipCode.pattern: Please enter a valid 5-digit ZIP code

phoneNumbers.atLeastOne: Please enter at least one phone number (home, work, or mobile)
phoneNumbers.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number including area code. For example: 555-867-5309

appointmentDecision.required: Please select whether you want to appoint a Health Care Agent

agentLastName.required: Please enter your Health Care Agent's last name
agentLastName.pattern: Last name can only include letters, hyphens, apostrophes, and spaces
agentLastName.maxLength: Last name must be 50 characters or fewer

agentFirstName.required: Please enter your Health Care Agent's first name
agentFirstName.pattern: First name can only include letters, hyphens, apostrophes, and spaces
agentFirstName.maxLength: First name must be 50 characters or fewer

agentMiddleName.pattern: Middle name can only include letters, hyphens, apostrophes, and spaces
agentMiddleName.maxLength: Middle name must be 50 characters or fewer

agentRelationship.required: Please describe this person's relationship to you (for example: spouse, sibling, friend, child)
agentRelationship.maxLength: Relationship must be 50 characters or fewer

agentStreetAddress.required: Please enter your Health Care Agent's street address
agentStreetAddress.maxLength: Street address must be 100 characters or fewer

agentCity.required: Please enter your Health Care Agent's city
agentCity.maxLength: City must be 50 characters or fewer

agentState.required: Please select your Health Care Agent's state

agentZipCode.required: Please enter your Health Care Agent's ZIP code
agentZipCode.pattern: Please enter a valid 5-digit ZIP code

agentPhoneNumbers.atLeastOne: Please enter at least one phone number for your Health Care Agent (home, work, or mobile)
agentPhoneNumbers.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number including area code

alternateDecision.required: Please select whether you want to appoint an Alternate Health Care Agent

alternatePhoneNumbers.atLeastOne: Please enter at least one phone number for your Alternate Health Care Agent (home, work, or mobile)
alternatePhoneNumbers.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number including area code

otherScenarioDescription.required: Please describe the situation you have in mind, or clear your selection for this scenario
otherScenarioDescription.maxLength: Your description must be 500 characters or fewer

mentalHealthPreferences.maxLength: Your mental health care preferences must be 4,000 characters or fewer

additionalPreferences.maxLength: Your other health care preferences must be 4,000 characters or fewer

strictness.required: Please select how strictly you want your preferences followed

attestationCheckbox.required: You must certify that this form accurately describes your preferences before you can submit

typedName.required: Please enter your full legal name to complete your digital signature
typedName.noMatch: The name you entered doesn't match the name in Part I. Please enter your full legal name exactly as it appears at the top of this form.
typedName.maxLength: Your name must be 100 characters or fewer

signatureDate.required: Please enter the date you are signing this form
signatureDate.futureDate: The date you are signing cannot be in the future
signatureDate.tooOld: Please enter today's date or a recent date within the past 30 days

eligibilityCheckboxes.allRequired: You must confirm all statements to serve as a witness for this advance directive. If any statement is not true for you, you cannot witness this advance directive.

witnessName.maxLength: Your name must be 100 characters or fewer

witnessStreetAddress.maxLength: Street address must be 100 characters or fewer

witnessCity.maxLength: City must be 50 characters or fewer

witnessZipCode.pattern: Please enter a valid 5-digit ZIP code

witnessTypedSignature.required: Please type your full name to complete your witness signature
witnessTypedSignature.noMatch: Your typed signature must match the name you entered above
witnessTypedSignature.maxLength: Your name must be 100 characters or fewer

witnessSignatureDate.required: Please enter the date you are signing as a witness
witnessSignatureDate.futureDate: The witness signature date cannot be in the future
witnessSignatureDate.beforeVeteranSignature: The witness signature date cannot be before the date the Veteran signed the form

witnessSignature.witness1SameAsVeteran: The patient cannot serve as their own witness. Please have a qualifying person serve as Witness 1.
witnessSignature.witness2SameAsVeteran: The patient cannot serve as their own witness. Please have a qualifying person serve as Witness 2.
witnessSignature.witness2SameAsWitness1: Witness 2 must be a different person from Witness 1. Please enter a different name.
witnessSignature.agentIsWitness: The person you named as Health Care Agent cannot serve as a witness. Please go back and update your witness information.

notSignedIn.title: You need to sign in to complete this form
notSignedIn.message: To protect your health information, you must sign in with a verified VA.gov account before you can complete and submit your advance directive.
notSignedIn.action: Sign in or create an account

unverifiedAccount.title: You need to verify your identity
unverifiedAccount.message: This form involves sensitive health information and requires a verified account. Please verify your identity to continue.

sessionExpiringSoon.title: Your session is about to expire
sessionExpiringSoon.message: For your security, you'll be signed out in 2 minutes. Select 'Stay signed in' to keep working on your advance directive. Your progress has been saved.

sessionExpired.title: Your session has expired
sessionExpired.message: You've been signed out for your security. Your advance directive progress has been saved. Sign in again to continue.

saveSuccess.title: Your advance directive has been saved
saveSuccess.message: You can return to finish it at any time by signing in to VA.gov.

saveFailure.title: We couldn't save your progress
saveFailure.message: We're sorry. We weren't able to save your advance directive progress. Please try again. If the problem continues, call us at 1-800-698-2411 (TTY: 711), Monday through Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. ET.

loadSavedForm.title: You have a saved advance directive in progress
loadSavedForm.message: Would you like to continue where you left off or start over?

startOverConfirmation.title: Are you sure you want to start over?
startOverConfirmation.message: Starting a new form will delete your saved progress. This can't be undone.

loadFailure.title: We couldn't load your saved form
loadFailure.message: We're sorry. We weren't able to load your saved advance directive. You can start a new form or try again later.

submissionPending.title: Submitting your advance directive
submissionPending.message: Please don't close this window. We're sending your form to VA.

submissionSuccess.title: Your advance directive has been submitted
submissionSuccess.message: We've received your VA Advance Directive. Your form has been sent to your VA care team and will be added to your VA health record within 3 business days.

submissionFailure.title: We couldn't submit your advance directive
submissionFailure.message: We're sorry. Something went wrong and we weren't able to submit your advance directive. Your progress has been saved. Please try again in a few minutes. If the problem continues, call us at 1-800-698-2411 (TTY: 711), Monday through Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. ET.

submissionTimeout.title: This is taking longer than expected
submissionTimeout.message: We're still working on submitting your advance directive. Please wait. If you don't see a confirmation message within a few minutes, check your email or call us at 1-800-698-2411 (TTY: 711).

duplicateSubmission.title: You may have already submitted this form
duplicateSubmission.message: It looks like you may have recently submitted an advance directive. If you want to update your preferences, you can submit a new form. A newer form will replace your previous one in your VA health record.

prefillSuccess.message: We've filled in some of your information from your VA profile. Check that everything looks right before you continue. If anything is wrong, you can update it here.

prefillPartial.message: We found some of your information in your VA profile, but some fields need to be filled in. Please review everything before you continue.

prefillFailure.message: We weren't able to load your information from your VA profile. Please fill in your information manually. If you think this is an error, you can try refreshing the page.

downloadFailure.title: We couldn't generate your PDF
downloadFailure.message: We're sorry. We weren't able to create a PDF copy of your advance directive right now. Please try again. You can also contact your VA care team to request a copy.

agentIsWitness.title: Your Health Care Agent cannot be a witness
agentIsWitness.message: The person you named as Health Care Agent cannot serve as a witness. Please go back and update your witness information before submitting.

missingRequiredSections.title: Some required sections are incomplete
missingRequiredSections.message: Please complete all required sections before submitting your advance directive.
